---
title: "Medyan Statistics Blog"
listing:
  contents: posts-en
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
  feed:
    title: "Medyan Statistics Blog - R"
    description: "R tutorials, statistical analysis guides, and data visualization tips for academic research"
    language: en
    categories: [R]
    type: full
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
lang: en
---

Guides and tips on academic research, data analysis, and visualization with R, SPSS, and Python.
